problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.
